case_title: VICTOR A IBARRA VS. JOHN PATRICK ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-01-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-01-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF VICTOR A. IBARRA & DEFENDANT JAMES SCHENK, DBA PISCO LATIN LOUNGE, ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS JAMES SCHENIK, DBA PISCO LATIN LOUNGE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JOHN PATRICK, DBA PISCO LATIN LOUNGE. PROOF OF SERVICE IN FILE AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-01-2016 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,160.00 FILED BY IBARRA, VICTOR A AS TO DEFENDANT PATRICK, JOHN DBA. PISCO LATIN LOUNGE SCHENK, JAMES DBA. PISCO LATIN LOUNGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE) SERVED JUN-01-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PATRICK, JOHN DBA. PISCO LATIN LOUNGE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE) SERVED MAY-31-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHENK, JAMES DBA. PISCO LATIN LOUNGE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IBARRA, VICTOR A IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PATRICK, JOHN DBA. PISCO LATIN LOUNGE SCHENK, JAMES DBA. PISCO LATIN LOUNGE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
